prestazioni: Engine swap to a **LS3 6.2L V8 (L99 variant)** with a **Holley Dominator EFI ECU** and **FAST 102mm Big Mouth throttle body**, retaining the A9X's original **SDS (Semi-Dry Sump) system** for improved oil control under high lateral G-forces. Pair with a **Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission** and **McLeod RST twin-disc clutch** for durability under 600+ hp.

Forced induction via **Harrop HTV2300 supercharger** (2.3L Eaton TVS) with **ID1000 injectors** and **Aeromotive A1000 fuel pump**, tuned on **HP Tuners VCM Suite** to target **12.5 psi boost** on **98 RON ethanol-blended fuel**, achieving **550 kW (737 hp) at the wheels** with a **3.46:1 LSD differential** from a **HSV W427 donor car**.

Suspension overhaul with **Pedders XA/XB Torana-specific coilovers** (adjustable camber plates and 24-way damping), **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)**, and **SuperPro poly bushings** (part #SPF0116K) for the A9X's **4-link rear trailing arms**. Braking upgraded to **AP Racing CP8660 6-pot calipers** with **378mm DBA 5000 Series rotors** up front and **4-pot Wilwood calipers** with **330mm rotors** at the rear, paired with **Motul RBF660 brake fluid**.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit** (A9X-specific, not LJ/XU-1 generic) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** (3D-scanned from original A9X homologation car) and **rear diffuser** integrating **dual 4-inch exhaust outlets** (stainless steel, **MagnaFlow 14815** mufflers).

OEM+ restomod with **Holden Heritage Parts** reproduction **A9X decal kit** (part #89920281) and **Brock-spec black bonnet stripes**, paired with **Hella Rallye 1000 headlights** (H4 conversion) and **Cibie Oscar LED taillights** (DRL-integrated). Wheels: **Rotiform LAS-R 17x9 +15 front / 17x10.5 +25 rear** in **Gloss Bronze**, shod with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear).

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro SRD-E full carbon fiber seats** (A9X-specific mounting brackets), **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm, quick-release), and **AIM MXS Strada dash** (integrated with **Racepak V300SD data logger**). Roll cage: **CustomWorks 8-point chromoly** (FIA-spec, bolt-in) with **Sparco 6-point harnesses** and **Schroth ASM2 racing seats**.
